thought.text: 文件中有 UTF-8 字符。让我用 sed 移除它们：

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && iconv -f UTF-8 -t ASCII//TRANSLIT task/1/antlr/main.cpp > task/1/antlr/main.cpp.ascii && mv task/1/antlr/main.cpp.ascii task/1/antlr/main.cpp

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && iconv -f UTF-8 -t ASCII//TRANSLIT task/1/antlr/main.cpp > task/1/antlr/main.cpp.ascii && mv task/1/antlr/main.cpp.ascii task/1/antlr/main.cpp", "summary": "Convert to ASCII"}
